## Plugin reference

- Description: Table column definitions section in the table detail view.
- Contributes:
  - `TableDetail.Section` "columns" → `ColumnsSection`
- Server:
  - Uses: `database.db`
  - `GET /api/catalog/tables/:tableName/columns`
